name: Genius Sports Data API
description: The Genius Sports Data API provides access to real-time and historical sports data including match state, statistics, and live data for American Football, Basketball, Football (Soccer), and Tennis. The API uses OAuth 2.0 for authentication and requires both access tokens and API keys for requests.
